name: lambda_decay_z
notes: Detector-coordinate z of the final Lambda -> p pi- decay after post-exit Geant4 transport/decay.

name: lambda_decay_r
notes: Transverse radius of the final Lambda decay from detector coordinate origin or documented MicroBooNE reference axis.

name: proton_momentum
notes: Truth proton momentum from the final visible Lambda decay.

name: piminus_momentum
notes: Truth pi- momentum from the final visible Lambda decay.

name: daughter_opening_angle
required_source: daughter_opening_angle or computed from daughter four-vectors
notes: Opening angle between the final Lambda decay proton and pi-.

name: lambda_separation
notes: Separation between neutrino vertex and final Lambda decay vertex after post-exit transport.

name: extra_visible_energy
notes: Visible energy not assigned to the final Lambda decay daughters or invisible neutrinos; includes post-exit decay companions when visible.

name: visible_gamma_flag
notes: Boolean or 0/1 truth-visible gamma or EM companion tag.
